description_long: This is an electric guitar with a classic double-cutaway body shape, finished in a sunburst pattern that transitions from a deep black edge to a warm amber center. The body features a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a set of control knobs for volume and tone, along with a five-way selector switch. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with dot inlays along the fretboard and a bolt-on construction visible from the back. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, and the guitar is supported by a black metal stand. Chrome hardware, including the bridge and input jack, adds to the instrument's polished appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of iconic Stratocaster-style guitars, making it suitable for a variety of urban music settings.
description: A sunburst-finished electric guitar with a double-cutaway body, white pickguard, and chrome hardware, displayed on a black metal stand. It features three single-coil pickups and a maple neck with six inline tuners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the supporting black metal stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sunburst body, bolt-on neck joint, and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the guitar's profile, the curvature of the body, and the metal stand's structure.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic Fender-style headstock with six inline tuning pegs and a rounded contour
